review_title: Great no-code site builder
description: It is easy to build and update and we get a lot of comments that the site looks very professional. Has chat function, blogging, user portal set up and form functions. Would be great to see Zoho build a service booking app that can integrate with the site builder. The visit data is also very helpful.
author: Rexie M.
pros: Easy to use for building basic website and has lots of features to make it look professional. Chat function built in makes us more accessible to customers too.
cons: Some of the finer settings / visual editor are a bit clumsy to find settings and not as customisable in certain areas as would like but for a no code platform it offers a lot of value for money. Page layout outside of template including pop ups or additional buttons / functions at edges of pages would be a great addition.

review_title: Excellent Response Times and Real-Time Help
description: My experience with Zoho has been very positive. I use it for a client and Sites has always gone out of their way to assist whenever an issue has cropped up.
author: Natasha L.
pros: Zoho Sites Support has been fantastic! They forwarded my domain for me after I'd had trouble with a hosting service. Had they not stepped in immediately and taken it upon themselves to lead the process, I would still have been struggling. Thank you to the team! They respond promptly to queries and go out of their way to offer assistance.
cons: I have no complaints. Service levels are obviously priority, and I feel confident for having chosen them as a service provider.

review_title: Terrible, useless app
description: An enormous waste of time, effort and money. Their support is just as terrible as this app. It takes them forever to reply and when they do, the answers they provide have nothing to do with the questions asked. ChatGPT knows more and have been much more helpful.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Only one - building basic sales pages. It's useless for everything else.
cons: This is one of the worst apps I have ever had the displeasure of working with. You cannot customize the sign-up process. You cannot customize the sign-up email. After sign-up/ sign in, a user is directed to the home page by default, and it cannot be changed. So, you cannot direct the user to what they have signed up for or even a welcome page. If you want to do anything half meaningful, you have to integrate it to Zoho CRM and try all kinds of tricky workarounds that all end-up with a bad user experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Zoho is the way to go
description: the experience so far has been great, easy to use software, lots of videos and learning tools and customer services has been nothing less but amazing!!
author: Francisco G.
pros: lots of tools under the same platform. I started using their email but ended up using lots of tools that I didn't even know they provide. Zoho One has been incredibly useful so far.
cons: so far everything has been great. I don't think there is a thing that I can point out.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: CMS Review
description: Somewhat okay experience. I use and recommend it for simple websites. Again, decent templates i.e. standard with what's offered in the market but not extraordinary - Designs are very important in the eyes of the beholder
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Great Value for money as the product offers a low cost subscription (including a free-trial) option. What is powerful is the whole suite of Zoho apps that can be included with Zoho Sites as part of the monthly (or annual) plan. Third party apps can be integrated easily i.e. plug and play.
cons: 1. Zoho Sites does not offer any freemium plan - only trial period. 2. SaaS providers of CMS products are ubiquitous, although Zoho Sites offers decent templates i.e. standard with what's offered in the market, they are not extraordinary - Zoho Sites lacks modern and trendy UX Web designs templates e.g. material designs

review_title: Easy Website Builder
description: Using zoho sites, I've managed to publish a working e-commerce site. I'm not IT trained, so this is great and it helps my business to grow.
author: ALDRIDGE L.
pros: Very easy to use website builder. Easy to integrate other apps into this website builder such as facebook and online stores like. Also their knowledge base is huge and easy to refer to. Zoho also listens to their client's needs and updates their site builder as needed.
cons: Only problem I'm facing with this site builder is that they do not have an option to publish your website in more than one language.

review_title: Good solutions for Intranet sites!
description: Zoho sites allowed us to create an easy and fast intranet that is behind the Zoho secure login system. user can see daily info on a website that is simple and fast to access overall very good!
author: Thomas S.
pros: Easy wysiwyg editor and that makes it super simple to create a quick website without coding experience needed. We use it for our company intranet and this is how everyone can update it based on different permissions
cons: editor sometimes is limited and hard to use. File upload has a lot of steps and when you link a test it sometimes separates it in 2 links but it should be really just one. you have to remove the link and do it again and then it works.

review_title: Quick Landing Page Builder
description: It made the job done for our temporary pages but if I had other tools at hand for this, I would rather team use them.
author: Nikita V.
pros: It is easy to setup with other Zoho internal systems, also not really helpful as the data communicated inside the environment is limited.
cons: It is hard to trust the previews and actual testing is needed to get a nice look of your page.

review_title: This easy-to-use but limited page builder isn't a good value
description: I wasn't impressed with Zoho Sites, especially since I recently evaluated most of the big names in this market. In terms of power and flexibility, Zoho Sites comes in dead last. It's OK maybe if you're already using Zoho CRM but I can't think of any reason to jump ship for it.
author: Rick P.
pros: I liked that it was very simple and quick to set up a new site, choosing from several decent if cookie-cutter templates. I liked that forms were included in the trial and in the basic tier. Some page-building SaaSes charge extra for this functionality. Zoho CRM can be integrated with any site. That's a nice option, I'm sure, although I did not test it since I'm not using Zoho CRM at the moment. I liked that each new site began a new free trial for that site. Very considerate. Tweaking existing elements was as simple as hovering to reveal the setting for that particular element. The settings were easy to understand at first glance and in a couple clicks it was easy to adjust them. I've don't recall having seen this sort of UI for any page builder out there.
cons: Very generic templates. No access to code, css, or for adding advanced functionality. This is not a platform for developers. The pricing plans were confusing and restrictive. Zoho actually charges for the number of revisions for each page? What? Who else does that? That really turned me off, especially considering how much I tweak when designing. But maybe since the options/settings were limited for each element, that's not such an issue. Zoho Sites is nowhere near as powerful or complete a package as Wix or Weebly, not to mention Webflow, which is in a different league completely. Also, I got several e-mails from marketers asking if I needed help. I would think if I don't answer the first time, that's a signal to stop.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: My experience has been great! excellent customer support, friendly platform! I truly recommend it!
author: Fernando J. G.
pros: The platform is easy to use, althoug it requires a little bit of IT background. The app features a well structured website building process that goes far beyond other competitors. It has a well suited website gallery, with many options and ideas. The user can also create it own templates, without needed to know much about coding. I also love the customer support: they're always ready to respond and provide more than one option to solve a case. Then they follow up, personalizing the service, which is great. Adding widgets is easy and they work just fine. Just following instructions is well enough to perform the operation and if help is needed, Zoho even offers an support option for urgencies. I've been using Zoho Sites for more than 2 years and feel totally satisfied.
cons: Zoho Sites does not currently offers the option to load your own HTML website code. You can only change or personalize the original Zoho code, but does not allow us to upload an entire website code.

review_title: Convenient site builder
author: Alisa M.
pros: I used this constructor at the beginning of my career. Quite good features, the program is simple and understandable for a beginner, but not perfect. Like any other designer, it has its drawbacks.
cons: Knowledge of the markup language is highly desirable, sometimes the editor works crookedly, you need to edit it manually.

review_title: Excellent website builder
author: Kary R.
pros: Without really knowing you can create website with just selecting a topic and aggregating its content. It is very easy to use and publish attractive sites in a short time.
cons: What I like least is that in some subjects I can not place the logo or the top of the form I need. I do not know if it's on all subjects but it does not fit wellWhat I like least is that in some subjects I can not place the logo or the top of the form I need. I do not know if it is in all subjects but it does not fit well.

review_title: With Zoho Sites, I easily made a free website
author: Anutte K.
pros: Service Zoho Sites contains all the tools for creating and maintaining various sites: there is an HTML editor, many ready-made templates, the ability to connect a slider and HTTPS. And all this is distributed under a free license. And even if you do not have much experience in creating websites, web projects, you will learn how to do simple projects in just a few days.
cons: I do not like that by default there is no toolkit for working with SEO, I would also like to see the possibilities for creating an online store.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Creates Websites Without Coding
description: I am a non-technical user with little time and budget for a professional website creation. Now I found Zoho Sites and I was surprised that creating and hosting websites can be so easy. In my case, I have only created a basic website because I didn´t need anything else, but Zoho gives users the possibility to build mobile websites or websites with dynamic content. There is one interesting feature for users with partners who want to collaborate in the website creation. You can simply invite them and give them the corresponding rights to modify the website. Overall, I can attest that Zoho Sites is a very easy and intuitive solution for people like me!
author: Doris B.
pros: There is a free edition Professional-looking websites without writing any code

review_title: Simple Drag & Drop Website Designer
author: Lea N.
pros: Zoho Sites has some of the best website design tech support I've come across. They are incredibly responsive, easy to work with and prompt, which is much appreciated when working with this type of software.
cons: The limitations when it comes to external integrations and add-ons can be challenging. I've already found some APIs that cannot be integrated with this site builder.

review_title: Websites had not been so easy
author: William V.
pros: It is very easy to create a quality and very elegant website. There are a variety of templates available ready for you to just add content and publish.
cons: In spite of being very easy to implement a website, there are some details that do require some knowledge to be able to perfect the elaboration. Very small details.

review_title: Zoho sites offers an easy way to build good and function websites
author: Daniel G.
pros: I like the fact that Zoho Sites has great functionality and a really easy way of creating beautiful websites in a very short time! Its pretty easy setup and easy to get https:// working!
cons: At first it felt a bit clunky when designing, it took some time to get used to everything, but once I got used to that it only takes minuts to create a full website with blog features etc!

review_title: First impression were good.
author: Stephen S.
pros: I tested this as we were testing several other types of tools. I really liked the interface and found Zoho Sites easy to set up and use. They have quite a few features but mainly if you stay in their ecosystem. Our org was heavily into MS products and we ended up using SharePoint.
cons: The only drawback I saw is that they tools work well within their ecosystem but may not be as integrated with other tools.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: May not be worth it
description: It does provide a decent WYSIWYG editor, but their are so many alternatives, it may not be worth it.
author: Jojo A.
pros: There are many features, and it's possible to get a unique looking site.
cons: It automatically gives you a subdomain.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I Mostly love about zoho feature and their services and their support.
description: I Stared used zoho sites and zoho product at my pervious organization that time i did not know about zoho but why i am exploring this zoho world i loved this experiences after that i also start to use zoho sites in new organization in that new organization i created more then 4 website every time i face any issue their zoho team member always help me to resolve the any problem.
author: Aniket S.
pros: I Mostly love about zoho feature and their services and their support.

review_title: Zoho Sites is perfect for a small business looking to create a website quickly!
description: Overall, this has been a great product for our needs. We have little experience in creating our own websites, so this product allowed to do just that with relative ease.
author: Scott L.
pros: The ease of creating a website because it is so intuitive. There is a lot of help available if you get stuck. We were able to create a beautiful website in just a few days. There are several templates to get you started and there are a lot of features to make your website stand out.
cons: Drag and drop isn't as seamless as it should be. While trying to create 3 columns, the third column would always go down to the next line no matter how small we made it. Also, while the support is responsive, they don't always have a full understanding of your issues which is troublesome. Zoho CRM integration is not up to par yet.

review_title: Reasonable web site creating platform that suffers from lack of flexibility
description: The block-based design allowed me to create a more modern website experience for the church but the free tools were admittedly lacking in flexibility and functionality. Knowing what I know now, I might have recommended a WordPress-based build instead because it had greater possibility for scaling upwards without incurring large costs.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The tools available to organise site structures meant that I could create and link several site pages together seamlessly. I was also able to easily add social media icons on various pages and an embedded Google Map to direct potential visitors.
cons: The lack of flexibility for page editing in the free product meant that I had to be very careful during the content editing process as it was possible to irretrievably lose large amounts of content and design if I accidentally deleted the wrong design 'block'.

review_title: A complete website building suite for everyone!
description: Ever since I started looking for a professional but simple way to create my own website, I tested and used 4 different software... until I found Zoho Sites. The overall performance of Zoho Sites is great; it offers a great variety of templates that can be customized in many ways. The free version, allows you to create up to 5 different websites per account, providing flexibility and the liberty to be as creative as you can be. You don't actually need to be a web designer nor a graphics designer, to create stunning, good looking sites that are easy to build. I could easily create interfaces with different other marketing software, without limiting or affecting the website speed and response. I love many functionalities like the form generator, the button (CTA), and the customization feature. Changing templates is also a great and easy feature, although sometimes it requires final touches to improve the colour combination, graphics adjustment, etc. Using Zoho Sites has helped me create a new stream of business within my own scope of services, and it feels great! So I recommend every entrepreneur to try Zoho Sites. I'm pretty sure you will have your own site in practically no time at all! great for sole entrepreneurs, consultants, coaches and small businesses.
author: Fernando G.
pros: Great overall performance, easy integration features, flexibility, easy to customize.
cons: Live customer support would a nice-to-have feature.

review_title: The gold standard for small to mid businesses that need help organizing all their information
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Zoho is amazing. With the ability to integrate with your phone and IT systems, it can track all your data incoming from different avenues and organize it into very simple easy to read formats. The primary goal of software like zoho is to increase efficiency which in turn increases your production and sales, and I think this is the best of the best in terms of doing that.
cons: They are constantly doing updates which isnt a bad thing, but when you are use to a certain format or interface and then it is changed, it is annoying to have to relearn it. Not a con as much as a peeve.

review_title: Great Alternative but not good enough yet
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Zoho Sites is a great alternative to its close competitor (Google Sites), Zoho itself is also considerably cheaper compared to its alternatives.
cons: Zoho Sites significantly lacks its ease of use, features & functionality, customer service and value for money so it is almost terrible as an overall.
